label: Concept
description: Defines a tutorial, learning readout, or modal help concept taught to the player.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort priority used by LessonAutoActivator to select which concept to teach next. Lower values are higher priority. Negative or zero means the concept is triggered directly and never auto-activated. The source default is float.MaxValue; the game logs a config error when the value exceeds 9999999.

noteTeaches.label: Note teaches
noteTeaches.description: Whether completing a reading note triggers this concept as learned. Used by Lesson_Note. Not present in shipped XML but supported for mods.

needsOpportunity.label: Needs opportunity
needsOpportunity.description: If true, the auto-activator waits for an opportunity signal before teaching this concept. Concepts that inherit from NotedOpportunisticBase set this to true.

opportunityDecays.label: Opportunity decays
opportunityDecays.description: If true, the opportunity signal is consumed after activation so the concept is not re-triggered. Set to false for concepts that should remain available until explicitly dismissed.

gameMode.label: Game mode
gameMode.description: ProgramState in which this concept can be auto-activated. Entry is the main menu state; Playing is normal gameplay. Defaults to Playing.

helpText.label: Help text
helpText.description: Localized body text shown to the player when this concept is taught. Supports input binding tokens such as {Key:TogglePause} and positional format placeholders such as {0}.
examples: Click a colonist to select them, then right-click to give orders.

helpTextController.label: Help text (controller)
helpTextController.description: Optional controller- or Steam Deck-specific alternative to helpText, shown when the player is using a gamepad.

highlightTags.label: Highlight tags
highlightTags.description: UI element highlight tag strings pulsed while this concept's lesson is active. These are plain string identifiers, not def references.

noted-opportunistic.label: Noted opportunistic concept
noted-opportunistic.description: Concept that fires when the player encounters the relevant situation, inheriting from NotedOpportunisticBase.

modal-concept.label: Modal concept
modal-concept.description: Directly triggered modal help concept with a negative priority so it is never auto-activated.
